title: Hello Love
excerpt: Have I told you how much I love having this love wall close to my studio? It's the best. Ann-Marie took some photos of me soaking up the sunshine with the Rocksbox gorjana summer trend set . I've been using…
body:
Have I told you how much I love having this love wall close to my studio? It's the best. Ann-Marie took some photos of me soaking up the sunshine with the Rocksbox gorjana summer trend set.

I've been using and loving Rocksbox for over a year - you may remember this blog post. Love that I can wear the pieces and decide if I want to keep them or not. It's like having access to an on trend jewelry closet without having to pay for the pieces I would only wear a couple times. The Rocksbox gorjana summer trend set is versatile and fun. The necklaces look like they are separate but there's actually several different ways you can style them. If you don't have a Rocksbox membership yet, you can try your first month free by using the code: amytangerinexoxo
